caption: Step 1: Open eBay Advanced Search
narration: Alright team, this is not shopping. Advanced Search is where the real hunt starts.

caption: Step 2: Enter main search keywords
narration: Target acquired: Sony WH-1000XM5. Type it clean and keep it precise.

caption: Step 3: Change the keyword match dropdown to exact order
description: Change the keyword match dropdown to exact order
narration: Exact words, exact order. No batteries, no posters, no nonsense.
fallback_narration: Set the keyword match to exact order.

caption: Step 4: Enter words to exclude from results
description: Enter words to exclude from results
narration: Exclude broken parts. We want headphones, not a glue-gun recovery project.
fallback_narration: Exclude broken parts from the results.

caption: Step 5: Include title and description in the search scope
description: Include title and description in the search scope
narration: Expand to title and description. Hidden deals love hiding in the fine print.

caption: Step 6: Set minimum and maximum price filters
description: Set minimum and maximum price filters
narration: Price window locked: 150 to 400. Steal? Yes. Suspicious envelope listing? No.
fallback_narration: Set the price range from 150 to 400.

caption: Step 7: Filter for new-condition items
narration: Filter for New. Fresh-box energy only.

caption: Step 8: Run the search and open the filtered results page
description: Run the search and open the filtered results page
narration: Hit Search. Boom. Filtered results, pure audio gold, zero junk.
fallback_narration: Run the search and open the filtered results.
